name: Outrageous Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Mix together Miracle Whip, eggs and water until well beaten.
3. Add brownie mix, mixing until moistened.
4. Coarsely chop two chocolate bars; stir into brownie mix along with chopped nuts.
5. Pour mixture into a greased 13 x 9 baking dish.
6. Bake for 30-35 minutes or until edges pull away from sides.
7. Immediately top with the remaining chopped chocolate bar.
8. Let stand 5 minutes or until chocolate is melted; spread evenly over brownies.
9. Garnish with chopped nuts if desired.
10. Cool. Cut into squares.
